nodes.name: Poll Every 5 Minutes
nodes.notes: Triggers this workflow every 5 minutes to check for new Google Tasks entries. These tasks come from voice capture via Google Assistant or manual entry.

nodes.name: Get New Google Tasks
nodes.notes: Reads tasks from Google Tasks that were updated in the last 6 minutes (1 min buffer over 5 min poll). Filters out completed tasks. Replace credential ID with your Google Tasks OAuth2 credential.

nodes.name: Filter Empty Tasks
nodes.notes: Filters out any tasks that have empty titles to avoid sending blank data to Claude.

nodes.name: Claude - Parse Task
nodes.notes: Sends the raw task text to Claude API for intelligent parsing. Claude extracts project, priority, tags, due date, context, and time estimate. Replace the API key with your Anthropic API key. Uses claude-sonnet-4-20250514 for speed and cost efficiency.

nodes.name: Parse Claude Response
nodes.notes: Extracts the structured JSON from Claude's response. Handles cases where Claude wraps JSON in code blocks. Falls back to sensible defaults if parsing fails.

nodes.name: Create Notion Task
nodes.notes: Creates a new page in the Notion Tasks database with all the enriched fields from Claude's parsing. Replace the database ID with your actual Notion Tasks database ID and the credential ID with your Notion integration credential.

nodes.name: Complete Google Task
nodes.notes: Marks the original Google Task as complete (or deletes it) after it has been successfully created in Notion. This prevents duplicate processing on the next poll cycle.

nodes.name: No New Tasks
nodes.notes: Dead end for empty/invalid tasks. No action needed.
